courses.title: IELTS Reading Foundation
courses.description: Khóa học nền tảng Reading cho người mới bắt đầu.
Build core vocabulary, scanning, skimming, and passage analysis skills.

courses.title: IELTS Listening Mastery
courses.description: Luyện nghe theo từng section với transcript và chiến thuật bắt keyword.
Practice section-based listening strategies with transcript review.

courses.title: IELTS Writing Task 2 Intensive
courses.description: Cải thiện lập luận, coherence, grammar range và lexical resource.
Improve essay planning, coherence, grammar range, and lexical resource.

courses.title: IELTS Speaking Confidence
courses.description: Luyện trả lời Part 1, Part 2 và Part 3 với phản hồi mẫu.
Practice part 1, part 2, and part 3 answers with feedback.

courses.title: Academic Vocabulary Builder
courses.description: Learn high-frequency IELTS academic vocabulary by topic with flashcards.

courses.title: Academic Vocabulary Builder
courses.description: Xây nền từ vựng học thuật theo chủ đề thường gặp trong IELTS.

courses.title: Grammar for IELTS Accuracy
courses.description: Ôn grammar trọng tâm để giảm lỗi trong Writing và Speaking.

lessons.title: Reading Lesson 1: Skimming for Main Ideas
lessons.content: Learn how to skim a passage to identify the main idea quickly.

lessons.title: Reading Lesson 2: Matching Headings
lessons.content: Practise identifying paragraph purpose and avoiding distractor headings.

lessons.title: Listening Lesson 1: Predicting Answers
lessons.content: Use question prompts to predict answer type before the audio begins.

lessons.title: Writing Lesson 1: Opinion Essay Structure
lessons.content: Build a clear introduction, two body paragraphs, and a concise conclusion.

lessons.title: Speaking Lesson 1: Part 2 Cue Card Planning
lessons.content: Plan a two-minute response with notes, examples, and linking phrases.

tests.title: Reading Foundation Mock Test
tests.description: A short IELTS Reading practice test for foundation learners.

tests.title: Listening Section Practice Test
tests.description: A section-based listening practice test with IELTS-style questions.

tests.title: Writing Task 2 Strategy Quiz
tests.description: A quiz for checking essay structure and coherence knowledge.

questions.questionText: What is the main purpose of paragraph 1?
The writer believes online learning is only useful for advanced students.
Which reading technique helps locate names, dates, and numbers quickly?
The passage recommends reading the ____ sentence first.
The lecture begins at ____ in the main hall.
Before listening, students should predict the answer based on:
The speaker says students should ignore distractors completely.
In map labelling, direction words usually help identify:
A strong Task 2 body paragraph should usually focus on:
Coherence mainly means:
options: Clear organisation and connection of ideas

questions.questionText: The conclusion should introduce several new main ideas.
A thesis statement should answer the essay ____.

questionAnswers.explanation: Paragraph 1 introduces the issue before the passage gives detail.
The statement is contradicted by the writer's support for learners at multiple levels.
Scanning is used to find specific information quickly.
Topic sentences often reveal the main focus of a paragraph.
The audio states that the lecture begins at 9:30 in the main hall.
Context helps predict answer type and meaning before listening.
Students should notice distractors and avoid selecting them too quickly.
Direction words guide listeners through positions on a map.
A focused paragraph is easier to develop and score well for coherence.

questionAnswers.answer: Clear organisation and connection of ideas
questionAnswers.explanation: Coherence is about how ideas progress and connect.
A conclusion should summarise the position, not introduce new main ideas.
The thesis statement should directly answer the essay question.
questionAnswers.title: Skimming and Scanning
questionAnswers.transcript: Transcript for skimming and scanning lesson.
questionAnswers.content: Nội dung bài học về kỹ thuật đọc nhanh trong IELTS Reading.

questionAnswers.title: Matching Headings Strategy
questionAnswers.content: Cách đọc topic sentence và loại trừ heading gây nhiễu.

questionAnswers.title: True False Not Given
questionAnswers.transcript: Transcript for True False Not Given lesson.
questionAnswers.content: Phân biệt False và Not Given bằng evidence trong passage.

questionAnswers.title: Predicting Answers
questionAnswers.content: Dự đoán loại từ, chủ đề và đáp án trước khi nghe.

questionAnswers.title: Map Labelling
questionAnswers.content: Theo dõi hướng đi, vị trí và landmark trong bài map.

questionAnswers.title: Opinion Essay Structure
questionAnswers.content: Cấu trúc mở bài, body và kết luận cho opinion essay.

questionAnswers.title: Speaking Part 2 Cue Card
questionAnswers.content: Cách brainstorm nhanh và nói đủ 2 phút cho Part 2.

questionAnswers.title: Environment Vocabulary
questionAnswers.content: Từ vựng và collocation chủ đề môi trường.

questionAnswers.title: Complex Sentences
questionAnswers.content: Dùng mệnh đề phụ để tăng grammar range trong IELTS.

tests.title: IELTS Reading Mini Test 1
tests.description: Mini test luyện Reading cơ bản.

tests.title: IELTS Writing Task 2 Quiz
tests.description: Kiểm tra kiến thức cấu trúc essay và coherence.

tests.title: IELTS Speaking Strategy Check
tests.description: Quiz kiểm tra chiến thuật trả lời Speaking.

questions.questionText: What is the main purpose of skimming?

options.text: To get the general idea quickly

questions.explanation: Skimming helps readers understand the general idea before reading details.

questions.questionText: Which question type often requires careful evidence checking?
questions.explanation: TFNG questions require comparing the statement with evidence in the passage.

questions.questionText: In Matching Headings, what should students read first?
questions.explanation: Topic sentences and paragraph focus usually reveal the best heading.

questions.questionText: Scanning is most useful when looking for:
questions.explanation: Scanning means searching quickly for specific information.

questions.questionText: Before listening, students should predict:
questions.explanation: Prediction helps listeners focus on expected information.

questions.questionText: In map labelling, direction words help identify:
questions.explanation: Direction words guide listeners through positions on the map.

questions.questionText: A clear Task 2 body paragraph should include:
questions.explanation: A strong paragraph develops one clear idea with explanation and example.

questions.questionText: Coherence mainly refers to:

options.text: How ideas are organized and connected

questions.explanation: Coherence concerns organization, progression, and connection of ideas.

results.feedback: Good control of main idea questions. Review scanning for specific details.
Strong prediction skills. Be careful with distractors.

learningHistory.message: Completed Reading Lesson 1: Skimming for Main Ideas
Submitted Reading Foundation Mock Test with band 6.5
Payment for IELTS Listening Mastery is pending.

flashcardDecks.title: Environment Vocabulary

flashcardDecks.title: Education Vocabulary
flashcardDecks.description: Academic words and collocations for education essays.

flashcards.example: Sustainable development is important for future generations.
Pollution can reduce biodiversity in coastal areas.
Schools should update their curriculum regularly.
Digital literacy is essential in modern education.
Technological innovation changes how people work.
Urbanization creates both opportunities and challenges.
